name: Bulgur Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound canned kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic, onions, green pepper, and mushrooms. Cook 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender.
3. Add the remaining ingredients. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes, stirring several times during cooking.
